text: 17:37 > R © <@ - P g ZRit 2 % £ o Sess Zro. G @ LI 5 ENTEZ ) O BT 6 5 And do not walk upon the earth exultantly. Indeed, you will never tear the earth [apart], and you will never reach the mountains in height. ' Sahesh International (xiv) Do not strut about in the land arrogantly. Surely you cannot cleave the earth, nor reach the heights of the mountains in stature.’ A Maududi (Tafhim commenta:
